tasks.title: Content-aware lockstep gate: hash-bound manifest, comment-insensitive semantic hash, spec-drift CI fail, no governed-file exclusion, spec-index lookup

scenarios: A governed safety-critical file is recorded with a content hash in the lockstep manifest
A governed file changed without its owning spec fails the lockstep check
The lockstep manifest excludes no governed safety-critical file
A cosmetic comment edit alone does not register as spec drift
A semantic code change registers as spec drift

tasks.title: RBAC-gated, ledger-audited re-stamp authorization: accept re-stamped hashes only via an authorized approval recorded on the governance ledger

scenarios: A re-stamp is accepted only via an authorized audited approval
An unauthorized re-stamp attempt is rejected
